AC-monorepo.description: Monorepo structured with /backend and /frontend packages and shared TypeScript config
AC-monorepo.notes: tsconfig.base.json at root; backend/ and frontend/ packages each extend it. package.json at root with workspaces.

AC-health.description: Backend Express server runs on port 3000 with health-check GET /api/health returning 200 OK
AC-health.notes: GET /api/health returns {status:'ok', service, timestamp, version}. Test: api.test.ts 'returns 200 with status ok'.

AC-upload.description: POST /api/forms/upload accepts multipart/form-data with a PDF file (≤ 20 MB)
AC-upload.notes: multer memoryStorage with 20MB limit. Tests confirm 201 on valid PDF, 400 on non-PDF, 413 on oversized.

AC-uuid-store.description: Uploaded PDF stored with unique UUID formId and createdAt timestamp
AC-uuid-store.notes: uuidv4() for formId, ISO createdAt in forms.ts. Stored in in-memory formStore. Test: 'stores the form in the form store'.

AC-extraction-trigger.description: Extraction engine triggered automatically after upload and returns a draft form schema
AC-extraction-trigger.notes: extractFromPdf() called synchronously in upload handler. Tests: extraction.test.ts full suite (69 tests).

AC-schema-shape.description: Draft schema conforms to Form Schema JSON specification
AC-schema-shape.notes: Schema: {formId, title, version, status:'draft', fields:[{id, label, type, required, order, a11yHints}], createdAt, updatedAt, extractionMeta}.

AC-field-types.description: Supported field types extracted: text, textarea, date, number, radio, checkbox, select
AC-field-types.notes: All 7 types detected via TYPE_PATTERNS in extraction.ts. Tests verify each type in extraction.test.ts.

AC-70pct-accuracy.description: At least 70% of fields correctly identified on a digitally generated test PDF
AC-70pct-accuracy.notes: extraction.test.ts accuracy test verifies ≥70% on synthetic multi-field PDF text. 3 fixture PDFs in test-fixtures/.

AC-response-shape.description: POST /api/forms/upload responds with { formId, status: 'extraction-complete', draftSchemaId } within 60 seconds
AC-response-shape.notes: Route returns {formId, status:'extraction-complete', draftSchemaId} with HTTP 201. Test: 'returns 201 with formId'.

AC-400-invalid-type.description: Unsupported file types return 400 with structured error JSON body
AC-400-invalid-type.notes: MIME check in fileFilter (multer) + server-side magic bytes check (hasPdfMagicBytes) in route handler. Tests cover both paths.

AC-413-size.description: Files > 20 MB return 413 with structured error body
AC-413-size.notes: multer limits.fileSize = 20MB. MulterError LIMIT_FILE_SIZE → 413 FILE_TOO_LARGE. Tests in api.test.ts.

AC-audit-log.description: Extraction failures logged to in-memory audit store with formId, timestamp, and error message
AC-audit-log.notes: auditStore.create() on FORM_UPLOADED, EXTRACTION_COMPLETE, EXTRACTION_FAILED with formId, timestamp, error. Test: 'creates an audit log entry'.

AC-error-shape.description: All API routes return consistent JSON error shapes: { error: { code, message } }
AC-error-shape.notes: buildErrorResponse() returns {error:{code, message, errorSummary}}. Tests: errors.test.ts + api.test.ts.

AC-wcag-hints.description: WCAG compliance: a11yHints per field, ARIA live region annotations in schema metadata
AC-wcag-hints.notes: buildA11yHints() in extraction.ts adds {hint, ariaLive:'polite', errorMessageId} to every field. Tests in extraction.test.ts.

AC-govuk-errors.description: GOV.UK Design System compliance: API error codes map to GOV.UK DS error message copy patterns
AC-govuk-errors.notes: GOV_UK_ERROR_MESSAGES uses plain English. errorSummary array is govuk-frontend error-summary compatible.

AC-unit-tests.description: Unit tests cover: file validation, extraction logic, schema shape validation
AC-unit-tests.notes: 69 tests across 5 suites. Coverage: 91.56% statements, 82.66% branches. All pass.

AC-readme.description: README.md in /backend documents how to run the service locally
AC-readme.notes: backend/README.md: prerequisites, npm install, npm run dev, npm test, API docs, curl examples, WCAG statement.

AC-test-fixtures.description: At least 3 sample test PDFs included in /backend/test-fixtures/

AC-typescript-strict.description: Code passes TypeScript strict mode with no errors
AC-typescript-strict.notes: tsconfig.json has strict:true. npx tsc --noEmit exits 0.

AC-owasp.description: No known OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities: filename sanitised, type validated, size enforced, no path traversal
AC-owasp.notes: sanitiseFilename() strips path traversal/null bytes. hasPdfMagicBytes() validates actual file content (not just Content-Type). multer rejects >20MB. helmet() sets security headers. memoryStorage prevents filesystem writes.
